productDisplayName: Doodle Girl Flap doodle angel Pink Tops
description: Composition Bubblegum pink round neck top made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves and chest print Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours in a delicate cycle Do not bleach Tumble dry low or lay flat to dry Warm iron when needed Do not iron on print Transform your little darling into the angel that she is with this top from doodle.
